## Meeting Purpose

[Follow-up discussion to outline SentinelOne's SEO priorities and GrowthX's approach for the engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/9DMv1a8kCAbHTYTYxsC1xappcv69Wmab?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SentinelOne wants to focus on optimizing commercial pages, particularly the platform section, to increase conversions and lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/9DMv1a8kCAbHTYTYxsC1xappcv69Wmab?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
  - [GrowthX proposes a comprehensive audit and weekly optimization approach, balancing focus with strategic insights](https://fathom.video/share/9DMv1a8kCAbHTYTYxsC1xappcv69Wmab?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)
  - [Procurement and security clearance (2-3 weeks est.) needed before official kickoff, but GrowthX will provide initial audit insights next week](https://fathom.video/share/9DMv1a8kCAbHTYTYxsC1xappcv69Wmab?tab=summary&timestamp=1527.0)

## Topics

### SentinelOne's Priority Areas

  - [Commercial pages optimization for increased conversion and lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/9DMv1a8kCAbHTYTYxsC1xappcv69Wmab?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
  - [Platform section focus (sentinelone.com/platform and subpages)](https://fathom.video/share/9DMv1a8kCAbHTYTYxsC1xappcv69Wmab?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
  - [CS101 UX improvements and content development](https://fathom.video/share/9DMv1a8kCAbHTYTYxsC1xappcv69Wmab?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
  - [Keyword prioritization and performance improvement for CEO-critical terms](https://fathom.video/share/9DMv1a8kCAbHTYTYxsC1xappcv69Wmab?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)

### GrowthX's Approach

  - [12-week "boot camp" to set strategy and build momentum](https://fathom.video/share/9DMv1a8kCAbHTYTYxsC1xappcv69Wmab?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Comprehensive site audit, including deep-dive on platform pages](https://fathom.video/share/9DMv1a8kCAbHTYTYxsC1xappcv69Wmab?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
  - [Weekly optimizations, content creation, and performance tracking](https://fathom.video/share/9DMv1a8kCAbHTYTYxsC1xappcv69Wmab?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
  - [Persona-based content strategy (e.g., CISO, security practitioners)](https://fathom.video/share/9DMv1a8kCAbHTYTYxsC1xappcv69Wmab?tab=summary&timestamp=1174.0)
  - [Hands-on execution, minimizing client workload](https://fathom.video/share/9DMv1a8kCAbHTYTYxsC1xappcv69Wmab?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)

### Balancing Focus and Strategy

  - [SentinelOne emphasizes need for focused efforts to show quick wins](https://fathom.video/share/9DMv1a8kCAbHTYTYxsC1xappcv69Wmab?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [GrowthX proposes balancing platform page focus with broader strategic insights](https://fathom.video/share/9DMv1a8kCAbHTYTYxsC1xappcv69Wmab?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
  - [Discussion on bridging informational content with product-driven pages](https://fathom.video/share/9DMv1a8kCAbHTYTYxsC1xappcv69Wmab?tab=summary&timestamp=1067.0)

### Next Steps and Timeline

  - [Procurement and security clearance process (est. 2-3 weeks)](https://fathom.video/share/9DMv1a8kCAbHTYTYxsC1xappcv69Wmab?tab=summary&timestamp=1688.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide initial audit and thoughts by end of next week](https://fathom.video/share/9DMv1a8kCAbHTYTYxsC1xappcv69Wmab?tab=summary&timestamp=1723.0)
  - [Official kickoff pending clearances, with structured 12-week plan ready](https://fathom.video/share/9DMv1a8kCAbHTYTYxsC1xappcv69Wmab?tab=summary&timestamp=1556.0)
